texto: Peace is a precious and a desirable thing. Our generation, bloodied in wars, certainly deserves peace. But peace, like almost all things of this world, has its price, a high but a measurable one. We in Poland do not know the concept of peace at any price. There is only one thing in the lives of men, nations and countries that is without price. That thing is honor.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Józef Beck: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Peace is a precious and a desirable thing. Our generation, bloodied in wars, certainly deserves p…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, honor, paz pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de paz e poland.
